alerts.title: Others Category Exploded by 1,484%
alerts.description: The 'Others' category jumped from ₹45,029.74 last month to ₹7,13,211.98 this month — an increase of ₹6,68,182.24. The top contributor is an obfuscated UPI merchant '❗ You Have Done A Upi Txn. Check Detail' accounting for ₹4,69,909.89 across 47 transactions, which warrants immediate review for potential fraud or miscategorisation.

alerts.title: Suspicious ₹99,999 Single Transaction to HDFC Account Update
alerts.description: A single payment of ₹99,999 was made to 'View: Account Update For Your Hdfc Bank', which is a common phishing/fraud descriptor pattern. This transaction should be verified immediately with your bank as it may be unauthorised.

alerts.title: Food & Dining Up 75% — Zomato and Blinkit Driving Costs
alerts.description: Food & Dining rose from ₹5,150.84 to ₹9,008.75 this month (+74.9%). Zomato alone accounted for ₹4,027.75 across 5 orders and Blinkit added ₹4,981 across 3 orders — together totalling ₹9,008.75, nearly the entire category spend.

alerts.title: Shopping Spiked 169% with ₹13,830 Spent
alerts.description: Shopping jumped from ₹5,130.99 last month to ₹13,830.56 this month, well above the 3-month average of ₹14,596.67. Amazon Pay E-Commerce (₹6,004) and Amazon Pay India (₹1,960) together contributed ₹7,964 — review if these were planned purchases.

tips: Immediately contact HDFC Bank to verify the ₹99,999 transaction to 'View: Account Update For Your Hdfc Bank' — this merchant name matches known UPI phishing patterns and may be fraudulent.
Audit the 47 UPI transactions totalling ₹4,69,909.89 flagged under '❗ You Have Done A Upi Txn. Check Detail' — recategorise them to understand true spending and identify any unauthorised payments.
You spent ₹4,027.75 on 5 Zomato orders this month (avg ₹805/order) — cooking at home just 2 of those meals could save approximately ₹1,500–₹1,800/month based on your current order value.

Blinkit spend of ₹4,981 across only 3 orders averages ₹1,660/order — consolidating quick-commerce orders to once a week and switching to a planned Amazon Fresh or supermarket visit can reduce impulse grocery spends by 20–30%, saving roughly ₹1,000–₹1,500/month.

Review the Medium Monthly subscription charged at ₹5 (likely USD $5 = ~₹415 at current rates) — confirm the exact INR debit amount and whether you actively use the platform; if not, cancel to save ~₹415–₹500/month.
